10506088.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10506088.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

10596250.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10596250.description: The Chapmans return to Hawaii after training bounty hunters across the US. Meanwhile, competitors have taken advantage of the Chapmans' absence and a convict may jump bail.

10602248.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10602248.description: The Chapmans return to Hawaii after training bounty hunters across the US. Meanwhile, competitors have taken advantage of the Chapmans' absence and a convict may jump bail.

10619693.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10619693.description: Cecily makes good on a bond after she decides to take down the missing fugitive; Dog lets Cecily and Dakota lead a search.

10626366.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10626366.description: Cecily makes good on a bond after she decides to take down the missing fugitive; Dog lets Cecily and Dakota lead a search.

10643046.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10643046.description: Dog faces his feelings about a past arrest that changed his life. Meanwhile, Beth attempts to stop the team from cursing and a look at the techniques of fugitive recovery.

10649884.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10649884.description: Dog faces his feelings about a past arrest that changed his life. Meanwhile, Beth attempts to stop the team from cursing and a look at the techniques of fugitive recovery.

10593485.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10593485.description: The team continues its relentless pursuit of one of Jerry's bonds in Texas. Meanwhile, the Chapmans continue to train Jerry's men and a K-9 is added to the team.

10596866.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10596866.description: The team continues its relentless pursuit of one of Jerry's bonds in Texas. Meanwhile, the Chapmans continue to train Jerry's men and a K-9 is added to the team.

10573307.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10573307.description: Dog and Beth train fellow bondsman and PI Elliot Sondag, helping him track down one of his most elusive fugitives in a gripping 24-hour escapade. Meanwhile, the Chapmans try to find a man that Elliot has spent six months chasing.

10643522.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10643522.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.
